aids.title: Disk Algorithms
aids.content:
FCFS: First Come First Served (simple)
SSTF: Shortest Seek Time First (greedy)
SCAN: Elevator (sweep & reverse)
C-SCAN: Circular SCAN (sweep, jump, sweep)
LOOK: SCAN but stop at last request

aids.title: Head Movement
aids.content:
Total = Σ |position[i] - position[i-1]|

For each move, calculate absolute difference
Sum all differences
